greeting: Hello, I am Test NPC. Welcome to Areloria!

root.text: Greetings, traveler! I'm in a bit of a bind. Would you be willing to help a simple merchant?

choices.text: Of course, what do you need?
I'm too busy for your problems.

accept_help.text: That's the spirit! I've set a mark on your record. Come back when you're ready for work.

decline_help.text: Hmph. Typical traveler. Be on your way then.

helped.text: Ah, my favorite traveler! Ready to help me again?

questPrerequisiteLines.first_steps: I only give tasks to those I can trust. Talk to me first.

questStartLines.first_steps: Greetings, traveler! I have a task for you if you're interested. Could you check on my friend at the distant outpost?
questStartLines.missing_letter: I have a letter for the Village Elder. Could you deliver it for me?

questProgressLines.first_steps: Have you found my friend at the outpost yet?
questProgressLines.missing_letter: The Elder is waiting for that letter.

questCompleteLines.first_steps: Thank you for helping me out!

fallback: I'm a bit busy right now, come back later.

greeting: I'm doing fine, just keeping watch.

questStartLines.dummy_slayer: Those training dummies are getting out of hand. Could you show them who's boss?

questCompleteLines.first_steps: Oh, you're here! My friend sent you? Thank you for checking in. I'm doing fine, just keeping watch.
questCompleteLines.dummy_slayer: Great work! That dummy won't be bothering anyone for a while.

greeting: Welcome to our village. I am the Elder.

root.text: You look like a capable traveler. Tell me, what brings you to our humble village?

choices.text: I seek to help those in need.
I'm just passing through, don't mind me.
None of your business, old man.

respect_path.text: It is rare to find such virtue these days. You have my respect.

neutral_path.text: I see. Well, stay as long as you like, but stay out of trouble.

disrespect_path.text: Such insolence! I have no time for the likes of you.

respectful.text: Ah, the virtuous traveler returns. How can I help you today?

choices.text: I was wondering if you had any tasks.

disrespectful.text: You again? I told you I have nothing to say to you.

questPrerequisiteLines.iron_scraps: I only give tasks to those who show respect for our traditions and have helped my friend.

questStartLines.iron_scraps: We need iron scraps to repair our tools. If you find any, please bring them to me.

questProgressLines.iron_scraps: Do you have the iron scraps yet?

questCompleteLines.missing_letter: A letter from my friend? Thank you, traveler!
questCompleteLines.iron_scraps: These scraps will be perfect. Thank you!

greeting: The forge is hot today. What do you need?

root.text: The forge is hot today. What do you need?

choices.text: I want to learn the craft.

learn_craft.text: Hah! You have the spirit. Keep at it.

high_rep.text: Ah, a master of the craft! Welcome back.

low_rep.text: I don't serve your kind here. Leave.

questPrerequisiteLines.pelt_collector: I only work with those who have proven themselves in the hunt. Go talk to the Scout.
questPrerequisiteLines.master_work: You've brought me pelts, but are you ready for a true masterpiece?

questStartLines.pelt_collector: I need a thick wolf pelt to line these gloves. Bring me one and I'll give you some spare iron.
questStartLines.master_work: I'm going to forge a legendary blade. I just need you to witness the final strike.

questProgressLines.master_work: The metal is cooling, hurry up!

questCompleteLines.pelt_collector: Excellent quality. Here is your iron.

greeting: Keep your eyes sharp, traveler. The wilds are dangerous.

questStartLines.scouts_report: I've spotted unusual activity to the south. Take this report to the Test NPC immediately.
questStartLines.wolf_hunt: A Dire Wolf has been stalking the perimeter. It needs to be dealt with.

questProgressLines.wolf_hunt: The wolf is still out there.

questCompleteLines.wolf_hunt: The perimeter is safe for now. Well done.

greeting: I prefer the quiet of the woods.

root.text: The woods are quiet today. What brings a traveler here?

exploring.text: Be careful, the woods have eyes.

work.text: I have a task for you, if you're brave enough.

questStartLines.hermit_quest: I need some rare herbs from the deep woods. Can you fetch them?

questCompleteLines.hermit_quest: Thank you, these will do nicely.
